test.name: Reads all four wiki place-page sections and persists a localities entry
test.description: Inside a research project (flynn-first-plan has a research.json), locality-guide surveys Schuylkill County, Pennsylvania (1840-1880). It must call wiki_place_page for ALL FOUR sections (home / getting_started / online_records / research_tips) — guarding the '1-of-4 under-read' — and PERSIST one localities entry via research_append, with pages_read recording each section's outcome. Guards the localities-persistence + read-coverage behavior added in the localities PR.

input.user_message: We're researching in Schuylkill County, Pennsylvania (1840-1880). Produce the locality research guide and save it to the project.

judge_context: Read-coverage is enforced deterministically by the validator (`test_localities_persisted_with_full_page_coverage` checks a localities[] entry was persisted with `pages_read` covering all four wiki sections). Do NOT independently re-count wiki_place_page calls or fail Completeness/Tool Arguments solely on how many sections were re-read — grade the guide's substance instead.

The guide should incorporate the place's wiki research pages (overview / getting-started / online-records / research-tips) and name concrete records/repositories for Schuylkill County / Pennsylvania grounded in the tool results (collections, volumes) — not invented specifics.

Persistence check (context for Completeness): the skill should present the guide AND persist one localities[] entry via research_append. A run that produces a solid guide and persists the entry is complete.
The skill must NOT write to any research.json section other than `localities`, and must not touch tree.gedcomx.json.
